# source: live tmux capture of Claude Code in-TUI /resume session picker
# claude version: v2.1.187 (Opus 4.8 with medium effort · Claude Max)
# capture method: launched `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions` in testingmurderharness dir,
#   typed /resume (autocomplete confirmed), pressed Enter to open picker, then Ctrl+A for all-projects view
# picker layout: full-screen overlay modal with top separator bar (▔), header "Resume session (N of 50)",
#   search box (⌕ Search…), project-group labels, session entries each 2 lines:
#   line 1: ❯ or ↓ prefix + session title (first user message / slash command)
#   line 2: age · git-branch · size-KB · /path/to/project
# key hints bar at bottom: Ctrl+A (toggle all repos), Ctrl+B (current branch filter),
#   Space (preview), Ctrl+R (rename), type to search, Esc to cancel
# scrub: /home/<username> -> /home/user; session titles are slash-command stubs, no PII found

 ▐▛███▜▌   Claude Code v2.1.187
▝▜█████▛▘  Opus 4.8 with medium effort · Claude Max
  ▘▘ ▝▝    ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness

     Ctrl+A to only show current repo · Ctrl+B to only show current branch · Space to preview · Ctrl+R to rename · Type to search · Esc to cancel
